ResearchProjectDef.label: forced evolution thesis
ResearchProjectDef.description: Probe low-order mutation pathways using resilient flatworm tissue. This crude foundation lets West Tek culture living FEV growth without immediately escalating to full humanoid conversion work.

ResearchProjectDef.label: FEV-1
ResearchProjectDef.description: Catalog the first stable Forced Evolutionary Virus handling process. This research only becomes available after a colonist analyzes an FEV probe.

ResearchProjectDef.label: FEV-2
ResearchProjectDef.description: Refine the first-generation process into reliable sample handling and cleaner dosage production. This research only becomes available after a colonist analyzes an FEV sample.

ResearchProjectDef.label: FEV-3
ResearchProjectDef.description: Stabilize isolated Forced Evolutionary Virus cultures for controlled colonist-facing procedures. This research only becomes available after a colonist analyzes an FEV culture.

ResearchProjectDef.label: force evolved flora
ResearchProjectDef.description: Adapt early FEV culture techniques into living plant symbiotes and surgical flora prostheses.

ResearchProjectDef.label: forced pollination
ResearchProjectDef.description: Weaponize plant-host mutation into contagious Spore Carriers that can spread flora mutation through direct infection.

ResearchProjectDef.label: forced cultivation
ResearchProjectDef.description: Cultivate stable humanoid flora strains, transforming compatible humans with exactly one plant symbiote into Numen.

ResearchProjectDef.label: force evolved fauna
ResearchProjectDef.description: Push the same early mutation work into animal hosts, establishing stable nonhuman FEV handling.

ResearchProjectDef.label: forced mutation
ResearchProjectDef.description: Force the S'Lanter genome into a Skinwalker-capable state, granting controlled access to an unstable transformation form.

ResearchProjectDef.label: forced domestication
ResearchProjectDef.description: Domesticate S'Lanter-derived subjects into a stable S'Nuffy fauna line and unlock specialized genome packages.
